description_long: This chair features a minimalist, modern design with a light wood frame and a gently curved backrest that seamlessly transitions into the armrests. The seat is flat and appears to be upholstered in a dark, possibly leather or faux-leather material, providing a subtle contrast to the pale wood. The legs are slender and slightly tapered, giving the chair an elegant and airy appearance. The open back and sides contribute to a lightweight aesthetic, while the armrests are integrated into the frame for structural stability. The craftsmanship suggests a blend of Scandinavian and contemporary influences, making it suitable for stylish urban environments. The overall construction appears sturdy yet refined, ideal for both comfort and visual appeal.
description: A modern chair with a light wood frame, integrated curved backrest and armrests, and a dark upholstered seat. Its minimalist design and slender legs give it an elegant, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved backrest, integrated armrests, and the full width of the dark seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the continuous curve of the backrest into the armrest and the slender profile of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open back design and the horizontal top of the backrest.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, emphasizing the chair's slim frame and the angle of the seat.
